task_completion.description: Create a new tax return profile for Jason Chen in StudioTax 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 application window is open with the taxpayer's name 'Jason Chen' visible in the personal information or identification section.

task_completion.description: Enter T4 employment income and stock option deductions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A T4 entry screen in StudioTax showing employment income of $185,400 and stock option deductions (Box 38/39) of $22,500.
The RRSP contribution entry screen or form in StudioTax showing a contribution amount of $12,500.

task_completion.description: Enter foreign income and foreign tax paid converted to CAD using the specific 1.3650 exchange rate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A foreign income/dividend slip or T2209 form in StudioTax showing foreign income of $4,777.50 CAD and foreign tax paid of $716.63 CAD.

task_completion.description: Complete the T1135 Foreign Income Verification form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The T1135 form is visible in StudioTax, showing the country code for USA and maximum funds of $182,000.

task_completion.description: Save the completed tax return to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box saving the file as 'jason_chen.24t' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\', or the StudioTax title bar showing 'jason_chen.24t' as the active saved file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual StudioTax 2024 application being used to input data, rather than a terminal, script, or text editor modifying the .24t file directly.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered or pasted the data into the appropriate tax form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Values like $185,400, $4,777.50, and $182,000 are seen typed into the specific input boxes within the StudioTax forms.

integrity.description: The agent opened and viewed the provided tax documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: A PDF viewer or image viewer is seen displaying the tax documents from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\' to extract the necessary values.
